# Yaga Calls - Professional Crypto Signals & Market Analysis

Yaga Calls is a premium global community providing research-backed crypto signals and narrative-driven market insights via Telegram. We prioritize risk management, transparency, and systematic setup ideas for high-purchase-power traders.

## Core Values
- Narrative-First: We identify the stories driving capital before the price moves.
- Risk-Aware: Every signal includes mathematical invalidation (stop loss).
- Transparent: We share historical proof of both wins and losses.
- Human-Led: All onboarding is handled manually; no automated bots.
- Compliance-Driven: No hype, no guaranteed results, no financial advice.

## Key Hubs
- [Methodology](https://www.yagacalls.com/method): Our "Narrative Killer" framework.
- [Proof](https://www.yagacalls.com/proof): Verified historical trading examples.
- [Pricing](https://www.yagacalls.com/pricing): Quarterly, Half-Yearly, and Yearly plans.
- [Regions Hub](https://www.yagacalls.com/regions): Comparison of global trading session advantages.

## Important Disclaimers
- NOT Financial Advice: All content is for educational purposes only.
- Risk Warning: Crypto trading involves significant risk of loss.
- No Guarantees: Past performance does not guarantee future results.
- Global Service: We are not locally licensed advisors in any specific jurisdiction.
